fieldDescription: One of: openai_compatible or anthropic. OpenAI-compatible covers Ollama, LM Studio, OpenAI, and OpenRouter.
Full base URL for the LLM backend. For Ollama: http://localhost:11434/v1
API key for remote backends. Leave empty for local backends (Ollama, LM Studio).
Model identifier passed to the backend. E.g. mistral, llama3.2, claude-sonnet-4-6.
LLM sampling temperature. 0.7-0.9 recommended for roleplay.
Maximum tokens per LLM response. Keep low for faster local inference.
Number of back-and-forth turns retained in the LLM context window.
Fraction of max_tokens budget allocated to history.
Scales all memory event TTLs. 0.5 = decay twice as fast. 2.0 = linger twice as long.
Maximum reputation points gainable via Starlogue per 30 in-game day window.
Maximum reputation points loseable via Starlogue per 30 in-game day window.
Write full system prompts to starsector.log at DEBUG level.
Write all LLM tool calls and execution results to starsector.log.
